description: The Popular Mobilization Forces (PMF, or Hashd al-Sha'abi) is an Iraqi state-sponsored umbrella organisation of predominantly Shia paramilitary groups, many of which receive training, funding, and direction from Iran's [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force). Its deputy commander Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis was killed alongside [Qasem Soleimani](/people/qasem-soleimani) in the January 2020 US drone strike at Baghdad International Airport.
editorial_notes: Iraqi organisation with strong Iranian ties.
